header.sample_warning_text: Starter sample; eligible for normal GK benchmark interpretation.

radar.scoring_note: Prototype robust z-scores within competition x season x macro_role=GK. Not official rankings. Stable frontend export; not an official ranking.

goal_map_save_map.zone_method: prototype terciles from all on-target goalmouth coordinates

sweeper_actions_map.coordinate_normalization_note: Events with raw x > 52.5 mirrored to defensive half (105-x, 68-y). Reliable because GK actions are confined to own half.
sweeper_actions_map.prototype_filter_note: GK-specific action filter; no generic touches.
